command_redacted:
cd ~/Downloads/dave_unzipped/dave && source /tmp/davetest/bin/activate
export GEMINI_API_KEY='AQ.[REDACTED-LONG-TOKEN]'
python /tmp/smoke_gem.py 2>&1 | grep -vE "kB|━" | tail -45

cd ~/Downloads/dave_unzipped/dave
source /tmp/davetest/bin/activate 2>/dev/null
export OPENAI_API_KEY=[REDACTED] -hoE 'OPENAI_API_KEY=[REDACTED]' ~/elios-scrape/.env | head -1 | sed -E 's/OPENAI_API_KEY=[REDACTED] s/^"//; s/"$//')
echo "=== dave installed? ==="
dave --version 2>&1 | head -1 || python -c "import dave; print('dave', dave.__version__)" 2>&1 | head -1
echo ""
echo "=== LIVE EXTRACTION: quotes.toscrape.com (known content = accuracy check) ==="
dave extract "http://quotes.toscrape.com" "Extract the first 3 quotes, each with its text, author, and tags" 2>&1 | tail -30
description: Run live DAVE extraction with funded key
